sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4046" key="a)leu/rinos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλεύρινος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n4046.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">made of</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἄλευρον, ἄρτος, σταῖς</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Dieuch.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:4:5:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.5.1</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
